_comment: 常用 SQL 查询模板（示例）。按业务模块维护，命中 triggers 关键词即直接用模板 SQL，未命中再走 schema 构造。module 字段按业务模块分类。

queries.name: 按业务编号查实体信息
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM t_business_entity WHERE entity_code = '{entity_code}' AND corp_code = '{corp_code}' LIMIT 100

queries.name: 按用户标识查操作记录
queries.sql: SELECT id, user_id, action, created_at FROM t_user_action WHERE user_id = '{user_id}' AND corp_code = '{corp_code}' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 200
